# Enforcement Decree of PIPA

Jurisdiction: South Korea
Region: KR
Citation: Enforcement Decree of the Personal Information Protection Act
Authority: Korean Law Information Center / PIPC
Source URL: https://elaw.klri.re.kr/eng_service/lawView.do?hseq=53044&lang=ENG
Topics: notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, cross_border_transfer, security_breach, accountability
Keywords: PIPA Enforcement Decree, Korea privacy, PIPC

## Summary
Korean decree implementing PIPA requirements for consent, notices, safety measures, breach reporting, and related duties.

## Key compliance obligations
- Check decree-level details for PIPA compliance.
- Apply prescribed security and reporting measures.
- Use decree with PIPA and PIPC notices.
